name: OrderMaster

consumes.minimum: 1 active comp + ≥2 contiguous selected layers, OR 1 selected ShapeLayer with ≥2 contiguous shape groups selected in its properties
consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem (must be a Composition) and its selectedLayers array. If >1 layers are selected, inspects their indices for contiguity. If exactly 1 ShapeLayer is selected, inspects its selectedProperties for contiguous NAMED_GROUP PropertyGroups.

controls.name: Randomize
controls.role: toggles between reverse-order and randomized arrangement

controls.name: Proceed
controls.role: executes the reordering operation with the current Randomize setting

functions: validate that selected layers or shape groups form a contiguous block
reverse the order of selected contiguous layers within a composition
randomize the order of selected contiguous layers within a composition
reverse the order of selected contiguous shape groups within a ShapeLayer
randomize the order of selected contiguous shape groups within a ShapeLayer
wrap all reordering operations in a single undo group

scriptSim.inputs: comp 'Main Comp' (1920×1080, 24fps, 10s) with two AV layers (Layer A at index 1, Layer B at index 2) both selected; Randomize unchecked

operations.value: moveBefore/moveAfter to reverse Layer A and Layer B

notes: Contiguous selection is strictly enforced: any gap in layer indices or shape group propertyIndex triggers an alert and aborts.
Randomization uses a Fisher-Yates shuffle (Math.random()) — result is non-deterministic.
Shape group reordering targets only PropertyGroup items whose propertyType === PropertyType.NAMED_GROUP in selectedProperties.
All layer/group properties and animations are preserved; only stack order changes.
Operations are atomic per undo group — either all moves succeed or the undo group still wraps whatever did execute.
Script targets Adobe After Effects CS6 or later (ES3 ExtendScript environment).
